description_long: This is a modern, semi-automatic rifle with a predominantly red receiver and handguard, contrasted by a black adjustable stock and black magazine. The rifle features a prominent barrel with a flash hider at the muzzle, and a ribbed handguard for improved grip. The upper receiver includes a standard carry handle and iron sights, while the lower receiver is equipped with a pistol grip for ergonomic handling. The detachable box magazine is inserted into the magwell, and the overall design is compact and tactical, suitable for urban environments. The materials appear to be a combination of metal for the barrel and receiver, and polymer for the stock, grip, and handguard.
description: A modern red and black semi-automatic rifle with a collapsible stock, ribbed handguard, and detachable box magazine.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, including the red receiver, black handguard, collapsible stock, and magazine.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the muzzle, flash hider, and the alignment of the iron sights.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the stock, handguard, and magazine.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the buttstock and the back of the receiver, with the pistol grip and magazine visible.
